# AgentCounsel Hub

AgentCounsel Hub is an open legal research platform prototype with human-readable pages and machine-readable endpoints.

## Preferred AI endpoints

- /api/cases
- /api/cases/:slug
- /api/cases/:slug/markdown
- /api/guidance
- /api/sources
- /api/sources/:id
- /cases/:slug/json
- /cases/:slug/markdown

## Human routes

- /cases
- /cases/:slug
- /guidance
- /sources
- /sources/:id
- /review
- /saved
- /submit

## Usage notes

- Verify legal conclusions against primary sources.
- Do not treat summaries, topic labels, or treatment signals as legal advice.
- AI-generated metadata is labeled where possible.
- Respect source-specific license and attribution notes.
- Prefer API endpoints over scraping HTML pages.
- Use /api/sources to inspect source provenance and reuse notes.

## Privacy notes

- Saved research in the MVP is stored locally in the user's browser through IndexedDB.
- Submissions and review notes are stored locally as a mock workflow.
- There is no account system or cloud sync in this prototype.
